# Feature Request

## Problem Definition
> Describe the documentation or workflow problem  
> Keep it specific

---

## Proposed Solution
> Explain how this should work  
> Avoid vague ideas

---

## Use Case
> Real scenario where this is required

---

## Expected Outcome
> What improves after this is implemented

---

## Constraints / Considerations
> Performance, UI impact, or technical limitations

---

## Alternatives Considered
> Any workarounds or other approaches

---

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Problem is clearly defined  
- [ ] Solution is actionable  
- [ ] Not already implemented
